name: ETH Compression Fakeout Re-Expansion v1
thesis: ETH 1h transition often fakes one direction out of compression before the real expansion launches the other way. The edge should come from waiting for the fakeout rejection and then scaling out into the genuine re-expansion, not from predicting the first break.
edge_mechanism: compression fakeout followed by true directional re-expansion
invalidation_condition: If fakeout and re-expansion cannot produce enough trades or post-cost PF above 1.0, then ETH 1h compression trap logic is not dense enough to justify follow-up.

long: Scaled-out exits: 40% at 1.2 * ATR_14, 30% at 2.0 * ATR_14
Trail final 30% using 1.3 * ATR_14 chandelier stop
short: Scaled-out exits: 40% at 1.2 * ATR_14, 30% at 2.0 * ATR_14
Trail final 30% using 1.3 * ATR_14 chandelier stop

regime_filter.detection_method: Require narrow Bollinger width, then a false break and close-based reclaim of EMA_20 in the opposite direction.
